markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on traffic recovery and evolve the content strategy for the AI era.](https://fathom.video/share/QpS2Xy_T5Z1ghxSTziPN6WrEZ55pAxkE?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Traffic Recovery:** Traffic recovery from the recent crawl fix is expected to be slow (4–6 weeks). The immediate plan is to accelerate it with minimal content refreshes and joint re-indexing requests in Search Console.](https://fathom.video/share/QpS2Xy_T5Z1ghxSTziPN6WrEZ55pAxkE?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [**Strategic Shift:** The core strategy is shifting from keyword-based SEO to AEO (AI Engine Optimization), which prioritizes building a public presence on platforms like YouTube and Reddit.](https://fathom.video/share/QpS2Xy_T5Z1ghxSTziPN6WrEZ55pAxkE?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [**Content Direction:** New content will be informed by Gong call analysis, focusing on the "AI is happening" narrative and the need for exceptional products/services, not just SEO tactics.](https://fathom.video/share/QpS2Xy_T5Z1ghxSTziPN6WrEZ55pAxkE?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [**Site Optimization:** A review of the sitemap's daily crawl frequency and the blog's tag structure will be conducted to improve technical SEO and user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/QpS2Xy_T5Z1ghxSTziPN6WrEZ55pAxkE?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)

## Topics

### Traffic Recovery & Site Optimization

  - [**Problem:** Traffic recovery from the recent crawl fix is projected to be slow (4–6 weeks).](https://fathom.video/share/QpS2Xy_T5Z1ghxSTziPN6WrEZ55pAxkE?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [**Solution:** Accelerate recovery with minimal content refreshes on high-priority pages.](https://fathom.video/share/QpS2Xy_T5Z1ghxSTziPN6WrEZ55pAxkE?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
      - [**Action:** Update a few stats and move sections.](https://fathom.video/share/QpS2Xy_T5Z1ghxSTziPN6WrEZ55pAxkE?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
      - [**Goal:** Trigger intentional re-crawls via re-indexing requests.](https://fathom.video/share/QpS2Xy_T5Z1ghxSTziPN6WrEZ55pAxkE?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [**Execution:** Webstacks and GrowthX will share re-indexing duties to bypass Search Console's daily limits (e.g., 10 requests/account/day).](https://fathom.video/share/QpS2Xy_T5Z1ghxSTziPN6WrEZ55pAxkE?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [**Related Optimizations:**](https://fathom.video/share/QpS2Xy_T5Z1ghxSTziPN6WrEZ55pAxkE?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
      - [**Sitemap:** Review the current sitemap, which requests a daily crawl for all pages.](https://fathom.video/share/QpS2Xy_T5Z1ghxSTziPN6WrEZ55pAxkE?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
          - [**Rationale:** This is likely inefficient, as most content (e.g., capabilities pages) is static.](https://fathom.video/share/QpS2Xy_T5Z1ghxSTziPN6WrEZ55pAxkE?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
          - [**Action:** GrowthX will consult its internal SEO experts for best practices.](https://fathom.video/share/QpS2Xy_T5Z1ghxSTziPN6WrEZ55pAxkE?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
      - [**Internal Linking:** Review and optimize internal links during content refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/QpS2Xy_T5Z1ghxSTziPN6WrEZ55pAxkE?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
      - [**Blog Tags:** Simplify the tag structure to improve content discovery and dynamic component functionality.](https://fathom.video/share/QpS2Xy_T5Z1ghxSTziPN6WrEZ55pAxkE?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)

### Strategic Shift: SEO → AEO

  - [**Core Thesis:** AI is ending the era of "gamified" SEO. Future visibility depends on an exceptional product/service and a strong public presence, not just keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/QpS2Xy_T5Z1ghxSTziPN6WrEZ55pAxkE?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [**Evidence:** Webstacks' traffic has declined over the last six months, despite using the same keyword-focused strategy that was highly effective a year ago.](https://fathom.video/share/QpS2Xy_T5Z1ghxSTziPN6WrEZ55pAxkE?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
  - [**New Focus:** Build a public community on platforms where AI sources information.](https://fathom.video/share/QpS2Xy_T5Z1ghxSTziPN6WrEZ55pAxkE?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
      - [**YouTube:** A top driver of AI visibility and citations.](https://fathom.video/share/QpS2Xy_T5Z1ghxSTziPN6WrEZ55pAxkE?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
      - [**Reddit:** An experimental area for building karma and engaging in conversations.](https://fathom.video/share/QpS2Xy_T5Z1ghxSTziPN6WrEZ55pAxkE?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)

### Content Direction & Process

  - [**Gong Call Analysis:** GrowthX analyzed transcripts to find key topics and messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/QpS2Xy_T5Z1ghxSTziPN6WrEZ55pAxkE?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Jesse's Feedback:** The core narrative is "AI is happening regardless." Content must convey that the answer to visibility is an exceptional product, not just SEO tactics.](https://fathom.video/share/QpS2Xy_T5Z1ghxSTziPN6WrEZ55pAxkE?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [**Blog Imagery:** Webstacks is experimenting with an AI tool to generate post-publish images.](https://fathom.video/share/QpS2Xy_T5Z1ghxSTziPN6WrEZ55pAxkE?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
      - [**Decision:** GrowthX will continue its current process (uploading illustrated images) to avoid workflow disruption. Webstacks will overwrite them as needed.](https://fathom.video/share/QpS2Xy_T5Z1ghxSTziPN6WrEZ55pAxkE?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
